full_text:
Yang Kui
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Kuiwas born in Jincheng. Took Han Sui’s head to Cao Cao and was rewarded. Yang Kui was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
